title: Free power for agriculture pump sets — 9-hour supply guarantee
target_beneficiaries: All farmers with agricultural pump set connections
summary: 9-hour free power promised for agricultural pump sets; actual supply has been 6-7 hours in most areas with frequent interruptions during peak summer demand. DISCOM infrastructure constraints and transmission losses cited. Free power itself is being provided but the guaranteed 9-hour duration is not consistently met.

sources.label: Agricultural power supply falls short of 9 hours — The Hindu
Farmers complain of power cuts during sowing — Deccan Chronicle
Summer power crisis hits farm irrigation — Telangana Today
